meaning: n.潜伏,潜在,潜伏物,性潜伏期(4岁或5岁至青春期),[生理](肌肉等的)反应时间(介于刺激与反应之间的时间)
examples: Is there a network latency problem?
Next up is the network latency issue.
That matters because even if downloads are fast, latency will translate into sluggish web browsing.
He says they improve speed by a factor of 10, and cuts latency time in half.
